cockpit.paper_mode.en: Paper simulates fills without broker risk. Live sends real orders after confirm.

cockpit.net_delta.en: Portfolio net delta vs limit — options + cash exposure.

cockpit.day_pnl.en: Session P&L: journal fills first, then Profit bridge, else paper stub.

cockpit.margin.en: Estimated margin for open structures from bridge stub.

cockpit.scan.en: Run Core14 scanner and refresh ranked ideas.

cockpit.kill.en: Pause all strategies and block new confirms.

cockpit.risk.en: Max daily loss R$500, position caps, cost per trade.

cockpit.setup.en: Profit bridge, gates, and integration checks.

cockpit.market_clock.en: Market session status — green open, yellow pre, red closed.

risk.max_daily_loss.en: Session loss cap before kill / block confirm.

risk.profile.en: Editable limits — max daily loss R$500 default.

cockpit.arm_ntsl.en: Export NTSL strategy file to imports folder — confirm before write.

cockpit.replay_lab.en: Sandbox replay job — no live orders; tune speed 1–20×.
